en: The LORD spoke to Moses in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,
zh: 耶和華在耶利哥對面，約旦河邊的摩押平原，對摩西說：

en: "Command the people of Israel to give to the Levites some of the inheritance of their possession as cities for them to dwell in. And you shall give to the Levites pasturelands around the cities.
zh: “你要吩咐以色列人，叫他們從所得為業的地中，把一些城給利未人居住，也把這些城周圍的郊區給利未人。

en: The cities shall be theirs to dwell in, and their pasturelands shall be for their cattle and for their livestock and for all their beasts.
zh: 這些城要歸他們居住，城的郊區可以牧放他們的牛羊和一切牲畜，也可以存放他們的財物。

en: The pasturelands of the cities, which you shall give to the Levites, shall reach from the wall of the city outward a thousand cubits all around.
zh: “你們給利未人的城郊，要從城牆起，周圍向外量四百五十公尺。

en: And you shall measure, outside the city, on the east side two thousand cubits, and on the south side two thousand cubits, and on the west side two thousand cubits, and on the north side two thousand cubits, the city being in the middle. This shall belong to them as pastureland for their cities.
zh: 你們又要從城外，向東面量九百公尺，向南面量九百公尺，向西面量九百公尺，向北面量九百公尺，城在中間；這要歸給他們作城外的郊區。

en: The cities that you give to the Levites shall be the six cities of refuge, where you shall permit the manslayer to flee, and in addition to them you shall give forty-two cities.
zh: 你們分給利未人的城，其中要有六座避難城，讓誤殺人的可以逃到那裡去，此外還要給他們四十二座城。

en: All the cities that you give to the Levites shall be forty-eight, with their pasturelands.
zh: 這樣，你們所要給利未人的城，共為四十八座，連城帶城郊都要給他們。

en: And as for the cities that you shall give from the possession of the people of Israel, from the larger tribes you shall take many, and from the smaller tribes you shall take few; each, in proportion to the inheritance that it inherits, shall give of its cities to the Levites."
zh: 從以色列人所得的地業中，你們要把一些城給利未人，人多的就要多給，人少的就要少給；每個支派要照著自己承受的產業，把城分給利未人。”

en: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you cross the Jordan into the land of Canaan,
zh: “你要吩咐以色列人說：‘你們過約旦河，進到迦南地的時候，

en: then you shall select cities to be cities of refuge for you, that the manslayer who kills any person without intent may flee there.
zh: 就要選擇幾座城，給你們作避難城，讓誤殺人的，就是無心殺死人的，可以逃到那裡。

en: The cities shall be for you a refuge from the avenger, that the manslayer may not die until he stands before the congregation for judgment.
zh: 它們可以作你們逃避報仇者的避難城，使誤殺人的不至於死，直到他站在會眾面前受審判。

en: And the cities that you give shall be your six cities of refuge.
zh: 你們指定的城，要給你們作六座避難城。

en: You shall give three cities beyond the Jordan, and three cities in the land of Canaan, to be cities of refuge.
zh: 在約旦河東面，你們要分出三座城；在迦南地，你們也要分出三座城，都要作避難城。

en: These six cities shall be for refuge for the people of Israel, and for the stranger and for the sojourner among them, that anyone who kills any person without intent may flee there.
zh: 這六座城要給以色列人和外族人，以及他們中間居住的人作避難城，使無心殺人的人，都可以逃到那裡去。

en: "But if he struck him down with an iron object, so that he died, he is a murderer. The murderer shall be put to death.
zh: “‘如果人用鐵器打人，以致把人打死，他就是故意殺人的；故意殺人的必被處死。

en: And if he struck him down with a stone tool that could cause death, and he died, he is a murderer. The murderer shall be put to death.
zh: 如果人手裡拿著可以打死人的石頭打人，以致把人打死，他就是故意殺人的；故意殺人的必被處死。

en: Or if he struck him down with a wooden tool that could cause death, and he died, he is a murderer. The murderer shall be put to death.
zh: 如果人手裡拿著可以打死人的木器打人，以致把人打死，他就是故意殺人的；故意殺人的必被處死。

en: The avenger of blood shall himself put the murderer to death; when he meets him, he shall put him to death.
zh: 報血仇的，要親自把那故意殺人的殺死；一遇見他，就可以殺死他。

en: And if he pushed him out of hatred or hurled something at him, lying in wait, so that he died,
zh: 如果人因懷恨把人推倒，或是埋伏著向人扔東西，以致把人打死；

en: or in enmity struck him down with his hand, so that he died, then he who struck the blow shall be put to death. He is a murderer. The avenger of blood shall put the murderer to death when he meets him.
zh: 或者因仇恨用手打人，以致把人打死；那打人的，必被處死，因為他是故意殺人的；報血仇的一遇見兇手，就可以殺死他。

en: "But if he pushed him suddenly without enmity, or hurled anything on him without lying in wait
zh: “‘但是，如果人沒有仇恨，忽然把人推倒，或是無意向人投擲甚麼器皿，

en: or used a stone that could cause death, and without seeing him dropped it on him, so that he died, though he was not his enemy and did not seek his harm,
zh: 或是因為沒有看見，用任何可以打死人的石頭，扔在人身上，以致把人打死，他本來與他無仇，也無意害他；

en: then the congregation shall judge between the manslayer and the avenger of blood, in accordance with these rules.
zh: 這樣，會眾就要照著典章，在打死人的和報血仇的人中間施行裁判。

en: And the congregation shall rescue the manslayer from the hand of the avenger of blood, and the congregation shall restore him to his city of refuge to which he had fled, and he shall live in it until the death of the high priest who was anointed with the holy oil.
zh: 會眾要把誤殺人的，從報血仇的人手中救出來；把他送回他所逃到的避難城去，他要住在那裡，直到受聖膏的大祭司死了。

en: But if the manslayer shall at any time go beyond the boundaries of his city of refuge to which he fled,
zh: 但誤殺人的，若是出了他逃進的避難城的境界，

en: and the avenger of blood finds him outside the boundaries of his city of refuge, and the avenger of blood kills the manslayer, he shall not be guilty of blood.
zh: 報血仇的在避難城境外遇著他，把他殺了，報血仇的就沒有犯流人血的罪。

en: For he must remain in his city of refuge until the death of the high priest, but after the death of the high priest the manslayer may return to the land of his possession.
zh: 因為那誤殺人的應該住在避難城中，直到大祭司死了；大祭司死了以後，那誤殺人的才可以回到他自己地業去。

en: And these things shall be for a statute and rule for you throughout your generations in all your dwelling places.
zh: “‘這在你們一切居住的地方，要作你們世世代代的律例典章。

en: "If anyone kills a person, the murderer shall be put to death on the evidence of witnesses. But no person shall be put to death on the testimony of one witness.
zh: 殺人的，要憑著幾個見證人的口供，才可以把他處死；如果只有一個見證人，就不能指證把人處死。

en: Moreover, you shall accept no ransom for the life of a murderer, who is guilty of death, but he shall be put to death.
zh: 犯了死罪，故意殺人的，你們不可收取贖價代他贖命，因為他必被處死。

en: And you shall accept no ransom for him who has fled to his city of refuge, that he may return to dwell in the land before the death of the high priest.
zh: 逃到避難城的人，你們也不可收取他的贖價，使他在大祭司未死以前回到本地居住。

en: You shall not pollute the land in which you live, for blood pollutes the land, and no atonement can be made for the land for the blood that is shed in it, except by the blood of the one who shed it.
zh: 這樣，你們就沒有玷污你們所在之地，因為血能玷污地；在地上如果有流人血的，除非流那故意殺人者的血，那地的血就不能得贖。

en: You shall not defile the land in which you live, in the midst of which I dwell, for I the LORD dwell in the midst of the people of Israel."
zh: 你們不可玷污你所住的地，就是我居住的地，因為我耶和華是居住在以色列人中間的。’”
